subsection.heading: Federal Charter.—
subsection.content: The American Legion (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a federally chartered corporation.

subsection.heading: Perpetual Existence.—
subsection.content: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.

html:tr.style: font-size:6pt; border-bottom:1px solid black; border-top:1px solid black; -uslm-lc:h1;

html:td.html:p: 36:44 (words before 4th semicolon related to perpetual succession).

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: Sept. 16, 1919, ch. 59, § 4 (words before 4th semicolon related to perpetual succession), 41 Stat. 285; June 26, 1953, ch. 153, § 1, 67 Stat. 82.

note.p: This section is substituted for the source provisions for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary and obsolete language.
